name: GPT-5.4 Pro
tagline: Pro reasoning tier in the GPT-5.
metaDescription: GPT-5.4 Pro (OpenAI), released 2026-03-05 — part of the GPT Pro line. Pro reasoning tier in the GPT-5.4 generation.
overview: GPT-5.4 Pro is a large language model from OpenAI, part of the GPT Pro line. Released 2026-03-05. OpenAI's highest-capability reasoning tier — uses extra test-time compute to think harder on research-grade problems.
What's notable in this version: Pro reasoning tier in the GPT-5.4 generation.
